examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: Now we're on our way back to the bus and we will be heading to the Grand Canyon. I'm so excited although now the helicopter ride is getting a bit more real. I'm getting more nervous as it gets closer. Oh kimchi in the middle of the desert even definitely I'm shocked.

examples: You look gorgeous in that dress!
